Erik Wilde: Your API Is Not Ready for AI — Yet

(2) From OpenAPI to AI-ready APIs

  • OpenAPI validity is not enough
  • Spectral linting is not enough
  • AI agents need clarity, safety, and discoverability


Erik Wilde: Your API Is Not Ready for AI — Yet

(3) There Is No AI Without APIs

  • Development Teams
    • Make AI-Readiness the default
  • API Platform Teams
    • APIs increasingly feed AI consumers
  • AI Teams
    • AI integration is hard but is necessary


Erik Wilde: Your API Is Not Ready for AI — Yet

(4) AI-Readiness Is Now Part Of API Strategy

  • Scoring is the first step: measure, compare, improve
  • Later: automate improvement and governance workflows


Erik Wilde: Your API Is Not Ready for AI — Yet
